Hot Topics · Vegas 2026

Vegas Baby —
XRP Takes The Strip

April 18, 2026
XRPCowboys Editorial
11 Days Away

Partners, the moment we've been waiting for is almost here. Las Vegas is about to become the epicenter of the XRP universe — and the energy is unlike anything we've felt before.

The Schedule

🥃
April 29 · Silverton Casino
Community Pre-Party Meetup — Top XRP influencers and ecosystem figures come together the night before the main event. This is where the real conversations happen. Partnerships get born. Friendships get made.
🎙️
April 30 – May 1 · Paris Las Vegas Hotel
XRP Las Vegas 2026 Main Conference — The largest XRP-focused gathering in the world. 800+ attendees, major panels, hands-on workshops, and announcements that will echo across the entire crypto space.
✦
May 2 · Members Only
DPMG Member Event — An exclusive follow-up gathering for members. Priority seating, deeper conversations, the inner circle.

What's On The Table

This isn't your average crypto conference full of hype and moonboy talk. XRP Las Vegas 2026 is built around real infrastructure — payments, tokenization, regulatory-compliant blockchain applications, and the kind of conversations that actually move the needle long term.

Top XRP influencers, blockchain experts, and innovative project founders will be on stage delivering powerful panels and actionable insights — from protecting your wealth to discovering the emerging projects that are quietly building the future of finance.

One of the most exciting speakers is Simon Babakhani from Zebec Network, whose platform focuses on real-time payroll streaming — meaning employees paid continuously, not biweekly. If integrated with XRP liquidity rails, XRP becomes the settlement layer and Zebec becomes the user-facing payment engine. That's not a concept — that's the future of work, and it's being built right now.

800+ Attendees Expected
5M XRP ETF Inflows During Dips
3× Ripple Prime Revenue Growth

The Backdrop Couldn't Be Bigger

Ripple Prime has tripled its revenue run rate. Brad Garlinghouse has been traveling the globe — three continents in five days — and his message has not changed once. Not defensive. Not cautious. Quietly confident.

"Making XRP more useful, more trusted, with higher utility — that is our North Star."

— Brad Garlinghouse, CEO of Ripple

The institutional money is paying attention too. Reports show approximately 5 million in XRP-related ETF inflows during broader market dips — that's not retail. That's serious capital moving with conviction. BlackRock. Vanguard. The smart money is lining up.

And on the regulatory front, Garlinghouse has pushed his CLARITY Act timeline to the end of May — right after Vegas. The timing is no coincidence. Expect this conference to set the tone for what comes next legislatively and institutionally.

More Than Charts — It's About The People

Here at XRPCowboys, what moves us just as much as the market is the people we've met along the way. When we started this community, we honestly didn't know what to expect. What we found was something we didn't even know we were looking for.

The friendships, the bonds, the late-night conversations about the future of finance — checking in on each other during the dips, celebrating together when things run — that's the herd. That's family. Behind every wallet address is a real person who believes in something better, and we are genuinely honored to ride alongside every single one of you.

Events like Vegas remind us of exactly that. Strangers become brothers and sisters over a shared belief in something bigger than themselves. That's what XRP does. That's what this community does. And this year in Las Vegas, we're going to feel that more powerfully than ever before.

XRPCowboys Will Be Watching

We'll be covering the announcements, the panels, and the energy from Vegas all weekend long right here on the site. If you're heading out there — ride safe, ride proud, and represent the herd. 🤠

If you're not going, stay locked in here — because when Vegas speaks, the whole crypto world listens. And this year, we have a feeling they're going to say something worth hearing.

This Is Our Moment,
Cowboys. Let's Ride.

The herd is growing, the bonds are real, and the future of XRP is being written right now. Be part of it.
